testimonials.title: Araa' mn 3nd n-nas
testimonials.subtitle: Shouf n-nas shno tayqoulou 3la r-rihla dyalhom m3a Latache

1.content: David dar khdma kbira bzaf f tjma3 dyal n-namousiya o l-mario dyal d-drari sghar. Knshkro bzaf! Nqqa blasa dyal l-khdma o jma3 l-karatene.

2.content: Sarah 3lqat lina t-telfaza mezyan o khbbat ga3 s-slaka. Khdma nqiya o driyfa bzaf. Ghadi n3awdo nkhdmou m3aha.

3.content: Hadouk li nqqaw lina l-apartman khellawha ktsh3el. Shouf ga3 l-qnat o jm3ou hta l-kuzina. Hada ahsan service khdemna bih.

4.content: Knt mehtaj msa3ada bsh n-hezz atate tqil f weqt qsir. L-m3lem ja f l-weqt o hezz koulshi mezyan o bla islahat khra.

5.content: Sswb l-robine li kaysil o bddel l-douch f aql mn sa3a. Khdma nqiya o thaman monassib.

6.content: Khdemt m3a wahd siyed bsh y3lq lya l-khzayen o t-tsawer f l-salon. Koulshi ja mqadd mezyan. Knnshkro bzaf Latache.

footer.appDescription: Sswb koulshi m3a app dyalna f l-telephone.
